title: Itoasia crassa
taxonomy: Itoasia crassa is a species of gecko, specifically a member of the family Carphodactylidae. This family is a group of small, nocturnal geckos found in Australia and New Guinea. Itoasia crassa is a type of cave gecko, which suggests its habitat is typically found in dark, humid environments. The classification of Itoasia crassa places it within the infraclass Lepidosauria, which includes all geckos and monitor lizards. Further classification within the order Squamata, which includes all lizards and snakes, also applies to Itoasia crassa.
